description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and stretched limbs and body parts. The head is somewhat recognizable, featuring facial features, but the rest of the body is unnaturally warped, with arms and legs extended in irregular directions. The clothing appears to be a single-piece garment, possibly resembling a coat or robe, but the details are obscured by the severe deformation. The feet are visible but also stretched, and the hands are not clearly defined. The overall form is not anatomically correct, giving the impression of a glitched or corrupted digital model. The surface texture is mostly smooth with some matte areas, and the dominant color is black with some lighter patches on the head and extremities.
description: A heavily distorted adult pedestrian figure with a recognizable head and extremely stretched limbs, mostly covered in a single-piece garment.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are most visible, with the face partially discernible and the body stretched downward and outward.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated arm and leg, with the head less visible and the garment's stretched form more apparent.
description_view_2: The back and lower body are prominent, showing the extreme distortion of the limbs and the garment's irregular shape.
description_view_3: Another side view highlighting the stretched arm and leg, with the head barely visible and the garment's form continuing to appear warped.
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and distorted, not in a typical human pose
